questionHtml: Suggest reasons for the differences in predation.
markschemeHtml:
a. the marmots have experience with/recognize predators ✔

b. parents shield them from predators
OR
parents teach them about predators ✔

c. those born in the wild are favoured in natural selection ✔

meta.title: Suggest reasons for the differences in predation.
breadcrumbLabels: B4.2.10. Adaptations of predators for finding, catching and killing prey and of prey animals for resisting predation
